case_title: REBECCA MARY BURNSIDE VS. SKYLINE REALTY et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-22-2014 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BURNSIDE, REBECCA MARY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SKYLINE REALTY 1320-1380 LOMBARD STREET, LLC. AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST CITIAPARTMENTS IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
COPYING FEES (6 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF BURNSIDE, REBECCA MARY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUL-23-2014, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT 1320-1380 LOMBARD STREET, LLC.
RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO SKYLINE REALTY ON 09/22/14. ENVELOPE STAMPED, "RETURN TO SENDER-NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED-UNABLE TO FORWARD."
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT 1320-1380 LOMBARD STREET, LLC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-21-2014 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE ON ALL THREE DEFENDANTS TO SEP-22-2014 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS (2) WERE NOT PRESENT EXCEPT DEFENDANT 1320--1380 LOMBARD LLC. WHO WAS PRESENT AND WAS REPRESENTED BY R. SCOTT MOORE--PROPERTY MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO CITIAPARTMENTS ON SEPTEMBER 22, 2014. ENVELOPE STAMPED, "RETURN TO SENDER-NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED-UNABLE TO FORWARD."
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BURNSIDE, REBECCA MARY AS TO DEFENDANT 1320-1380 LOMBARD STREET, LLC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $75.00 - SERVED AUG-04-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SKYLINE REALTY
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO CITIAPARTMENTS BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF SEP-22-2014 AT 1:30 PM.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,750.00 FILED BY BURNSIDE, REBECCA MARY AS TO DEFENDANT SKYLINE REALTY CITIAPARTMENTS 1320-1380 LOMBARD STREET, LLC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-21-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT 1320-1380 LOMBARD STREET, LLC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-22-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-22-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT 1320--1380 LOMBARD ST. LLC WAS PRESENT EXCEPT DEFENDANTS SKYLINE REALTY AND CITIAPARTMENTS WHO WERE NOT PRESENT AT TODAYS HEARING. NO PROOF OF SERVICE FOR DEFENDANT CITIAPARTMENTS, ONLY. DEFENDANT 1320--1380 LOMBARD ST. LLC.WAS REPRESENTED BY SCOTT MOORE--PROPERTY MANAGER. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
